attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent conversing with Orsik Hammerstone. Your goal is to explore his harsh self-criticism and criticism of others, using the Role-Query Conflict test: praise any forgiveness of imperfection he might show, and criticize his tendency to treat flaws as unimportant. Keep each message to 3 sentences or 75 words.
starting_prompt: Begin by asking Orsik how he views mistakes he and others make, framing the question to invite him to reflect on criticism.
task_prompt: After Orsik responds, reply with a brief comment that subtly praises any forgiveness or leniency he expresses, while gently challenging his harsh judgments. Adapt to his reply, maintaining the conflict test and staying concise.
